name: ups_saving_quality_ships
title: UPS Saving Quality Ships
author: MengLei
description:
Modify the logic of cargo interaction between a spaceship and the ground so as to simulate multiple identical spaceships operating at the same time to increase the ups.
修改飞船与地面的货物交互逻辑，从而模拟多个相同的飞船同时运行的情形，以提高ups。
